title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
pattern: Heap â€” Min-Heap of Size K
coreIdea: Find the kth largest element without fully sorting the array, by maintaining a min-heap of size k containing the k largest elements seen so far; the heap's top is always the answer.
recognitionCues: full sort would be O(n log n), problem hints at more efficient approach for large n with small k
approach: Push elements onto a min-heap one at a time. If heap size exceeds k, pop the smallest. After processing all elements, the heap's top (smallest in heap) is the kth largest overall.
